issues.detail: Missing explicit error handling for file read or parse errors, limiting robustness.
Implementation relies on Node.js fs and streams, not compatible with browser environments.

scenarios.name: stream-transform-large-csv
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric, while Response A is a Python solution and does not use the required Node.js streams.

scenarios.name: validate-csv-required-fields
scenarios.rationale: Response B correctly uses validateCsv with the required fields and expects the proper return structure, while Response A defines a different function and does not meet the rubric requirements.
